response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery: no explicit RAG, vector database, multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI), or LLM evaluation/observability experience, and Python is absent from the skill set despite being a core requirement. Cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK only). Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI-agent and MCP work.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node.js, with recent AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq
Strong engineering-excellence background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops and mentoring
Proven ownership of complex, customer-facing platforms (Optilyz pricing, Sociomantic high-throughput data integration, GISCollective)
concerns: No Python listed in skills despite being a primary required language for the role
No explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
Cloud exposure limited to AWS CDK; no evidence of GCP/Azure or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, multi-agent frameworks)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work at re:cinq
